# ClearRoad (דרך ברורה)

> Hebrew-first driving theory study app for the Israeli car-B license exam, designed for 16-year-olds.

## Study content
- [Topics](/topics): 1,802 official exam questions organised by topic, with inline traffic-sign images
- [Flashcards](/flashcards): 277 official Israeli traffic-sign flashcards with flip animation
- [Videos](/videos): Video resources for exam preparation
- [Resources](/resources): Additional study resources

## About
ClearRoad helps Israeli learners prepare for the official car-B driving theory exam. The interface is fully in Hebrew (RTL) with a warm, encouraging feminine tone throughout. Progress tracking, streaks, star points, and a weekly study schedule are built in.

Authentication is magic-link (email only, no password). Most content requires a free account.
